title: Aerostructures Manufacturing (Tier 2)
entry_mechanism: PSAP Track 1/2 — attract international Tier 2 aerostructures manufacturer to Saudi JV at KAEC
executive_summary: Node MA-5 is the Phase II aerostructures step-change: from UAV sub-assemblies (MA-1) to full Tier 2 structural assembly manufacturing with NADCAP accreditation for fixed-wing military aircraft. A NADCAP-accredited Saudi Tier 2 manufacturer can compete for work packages on technical merit alongside established global suppliers. Without NADCAP, Saudi manufacturers are permanently limited to Tier 3 component supply. MA-5 is the credentialisation step that opens the door to the global aerospace supply chain — dependent on Phase I foundations from MA-1 and MA-3.

companies.name: Sonaca
companies.rationale: Tier 1/2 aerostructures with Airbus/Boeing supply chain pedigree; active Gulf manufacturing interest; non-ITAR.
companies.contact: Sonaca VP Business Development, Middle East & Africa

companies.name: Daher
companies.rationale: French Tier 2 with composite and metallic aerostructures; more agile JV partner; non-ITAR.

companies.name: Ducommun
companies.rationale: US Tier 2 with aluminium and titanium structural assemblies; F-35 supply chain; IPP leverage available.

companies.name: Triumph Group
companies.rationale: Tier 2 with metallic aerostructures and component repair; prior Saudi engagement; IPP candidates.

companies.name: GKN Aerospace
companies.rationale: F-35 and A350 aerostructures pedigree; Saudi Arabia Vision 2030 engagement; Phase II–III partner.
companies.contact: GKN Aerospace VP Strategy and M&A

partners.name: SAMI / SAMI Engineering
partners.current: Final assembly experience, growing composite and machining base from Phase I
partners.upgrade: Phase II JV with international Tier 2 + NADCAP accreditation programme + 30 structural engineers

partners.name: KAEC Precision Machining Platform
partners.current: Phase I machining infrastructure established by MA-3 and MA-1
partners.upgrade: Scale to 5-axis large-format machining + chemical processing expansion + aerospace-grade quality system
partners.timeline: Depends on Phase I completion (MA-1, MA-3)

partners.name: KFUPM / KAUST Aerospace Graduate Pipeline
partners.current: Phase I technical graduates feeding MA-1 and MA-3 roles
partners.upgrade: Phase II 15-engineer cohort for 12-month Tier 2 immersion at partner facility (Sonaca/Daher Europe)
partners.timeline: Ready for Phase II roles after 12-month immersion

partners.name: Saudi Standards Authority (SASO) / SASO NADCAP Office
partners.current: Standards body with aerospace certification oversight
partners.upgrade: Establish a SASO-NADCAP liaison office to streamline NADCAP audit coordination for Saudi facilities
